scripts.check: for d in components/*/; do echo ">>> $d"; (cd "$d" && npm run check) || exit 1; done
scripts.snapshot: for d in components/*/; do echo ">>> $d"; (cd "$d" && npm run snapshot) || exit 1; done
scripts.vreg: for d in components/*/; do echo ">>> $d"; (cd "$d" && npm run vreg) || exit 1; done
